title: Private Instructor-Led Training
bodyRedactorRestricted: Take your team’s skills to the next level with immersive, structured expert-led training. Led by BeyondTrust instructors, each session combines interactive, hands-on learning with opportunities for real-time feedback and discussion. Your team will gain practical knowledge and confidence to configure, administer, and optimize BeyondTrust solutions—driving stronger security, smoother operations, and measurable results.

fields.heading: Learn from BeyondTrust experts
fields.body: Get hands-on guidance from certified instructors to help your team master each product.

fields.heading: Interactive, structured learning
fields.body: Follow a clear curriculum with opportunities to ask questions and engage in real time.

fields.heading: Private to your team
fields.body: Train exclusively with your colleagues in a focused, collaborative environment.

fields.heading: Flexible scheduling
fields.body: Sessions are planned around your team’s availability.

fields.bodyRedactorRestricted:
• Available virtually or in person for your team’s convenience.
  • Courses typically run 2–4 days, depending on the product, with about 4 hours of instruction per day.
  • Limited to up to 10 participants to ensure an engaging, personalized experience.
  • Includes course manuals, virtual lab environments, and access to the BeyondTrust University education portal.
  • Earn up to 16 hours of CPE credit with most courses.
  • All private, instructor-led training courses qualify toward BeyondTrust certifications.

fields.question: How do I know if Private Instructor-Led training (ILT) is right for me?
fields.answer: Private training is ideal for teams responsible for deploying, managing, or administering BeyondTrust solutions. It’s especially valuable for organizations that want an interactive learning experience with direct access to a BeyondTrust University expert for real-time guidance and support.

fields.question: How do I inquire more about Private training?
fields.answer: If you are interested in purchasing our training, reach out to your account representative. If you do not know your representative, please fill out the form here and add “Private ILT Training” into the message box. Someone will reach out to you after the submission.

fields.question: I’ve purchased a Private course. How do I schedule it?
fields.answer: Your designated training contact will receive an email from BeyondTrust with course details and scheduling options. Simply reply to that email to confirm your preferred dates. If you need to update your training contact or require assistance, please reach out to your Account Manager or email btu@beyondtrust.com

fields.question: Is virtual or on-site better?
fields.answer: Most organizations choose virtual training for its convenience and flexibility. However, on-site sessions are available upon request, subject to instructor availability, travel restrictions, and additional travel-related costs.

fields.question: How do you handle scheduling for teams in different time zones or locations?
fields.answer: All participants in a private course must attend the same session at the same date and time. If your team is spread across multiple regions or requires separate sessions, we recommend purchasing additional courses to accommodate those needs.

fields.question: Can the training content be customized for our environment?
fields.answer: Private ILT follows a structured curriculum (with limited customizations) that progresses from foundational to advanced topics with opportunities for questions and real-time feedback. For organizations seeking a fully customized learning experience, ask your Account Manager about our custom ILT options or contact btu@beyondtrust.com.

fields.question: What other learning options are there?
fields.answer: See our main BeyondTrust University page to view other offerings: https://www.beyondtrust.com/services-training/beyondtrust-university

fields.headingSection: Check out course offerings for Private training

fields.heading: AD Bridge Foundations
fields.body: Administrator-level course covers installation, administration, and monitoring with AD Bridge.

fields.heading: Endpoint Privilege Management for Mac
fields.body: Administrator-level course covers how to deploy, configure, and utilize Endpoint Privilege Management for Mac in their unique environment.

fields.heading: Endpoint Privilege Management for Unix & Linux
fields.body: Administrator-level course covers installation, administering, monitoring and reporting for Endpoint Privilege Management for Unix & Linux.

fields.heading: Endpoint Privilege Management for Windows
fields.body: Administrator-level course covers how to deploy, configure, and utilize Endpoint Privilege Management for Windows.

fields.heading: Password Safe Administration
fields.body: Administrator-level course covers administering, monitoring, configuring, and reporting on your Password Safe environment.

fields.heading: Privileged Remote Access Administration
fields.body: Administrator-level course for system and network admins who want to learn how to configure BeyondTrust in the network and manage secure access to critical systems.

fields.heading: Remote Support Administration
fields.body: Administrator-level course for system/network admins who want to learn how to configure and extend Remote Support for their unique environment.

title: Get Certified

fields.body180: Elevate your career and knowledge by getting certified with BeyondTrust’s extensive line of products
fields.label: Log in to BeyondTrust University

bodyRedactorRestricted: Earning a BeyondTrust University Certification demonstrates your expertise in Privileged Access Management (PAM) and BeyondTrust solutions—skills that are in high demand across the cybersecurity industry. Our certifications validate your technical proficiency, build your professional credibility, and empower you to deploy, manage, and optimize BeyondTrust solutions with confidence.

fields.heading: Take courses
fields.body: Strengthen your skills and validate your knowledge through immersive learning.

fields.heading: Earn badges
fields.body: Gain verified digital badges to showcase your achievements and professional growth.

fields.heading: Share your success
fields.body: Celebrate your accomplishments online and inspire others in the cybersecurity community.

fields.bodyRedactorRestricted:
• Obtain up to 16 hours of Continuing Professional Education (CPE) credits per course
  • Earn CPE credits with shorter, topic-focused workshops designed to fit your schedule
  • Maintain and validate certifications and CPE records with the BeyondTrust University portal
  • Stay compliant with industry standards while advancing your cybersecurity career with BeyondTrust University

BeyondTrust University offers flexible pathways to earn your Administrative Certification tailored to your learning style. Explore our training programs that offer Certification and choose one that’s right for you.

Please note: BeyondTrust University awards certification badges only upon completion of an instructor-led course. The two programs listed below include options for ILT training.

fields.heading: Success Elevated
fields.body: Success Elevated is our premium training subscription that builds on the value of our on-demand eLearning, taking your BeyondTrust expertise to the next level. Through this blended learning experience, you’ll strengthen your foundational knowledge and gain practical skills to apply best practices in real-world scenarios through expert-led administrative training, live workshops, and much more.

fields.heading: Private Instructor-Led Training
fields.body: Our private, instructor-led training offers an interactive and structured learning experience tailored to your organization’s needs. Led by BeyondTrust University experts, these immersive sessions—available online or in person—equip your team with the skills to efficiently administer, configure, and optimize BeyondTrust for ongoing security success.

fields.body250: BeyondTrust University issues verified digital credentials through Credly. Explore our full range of Certified Administrator programs and begin your learning journey with BeyondTrust University today.

fields.question: How and when is certification issued?
fields.answer:
BeyondTrust University (BTU) Certification is granted upon successful completion of the required Instructor-Led Training (ILT) course and a passing score of 75% or higher on the certification exam.

All exams are completed online through the BTU portal, and results are provided immediately after you submit your answers. You’ll receive an email as well to download your certification.

fields.question: What should I expect on the certification exam?
fields.answer: The certification exams are delivered online through the BTU portal and include 40 questions per attempt, randomly selected from rotating question pools to ensure a unique experience each time. All exam topics are covered in the Administration course. Although the exam is open note, it must be completed independently without assistance.

fields.question: Are practice tests available before the exam?
fields.answer: We do not currently offer dedicated practice exams. However, many of our eLearning courses include knowledge checks that mirror the style of questions on the certification exam. Since the exam is open book, we encourage you to utilize all available training materials, notes, and resources to support your success.

fields.question: Am I required to take self-paced eLearning courses and labs to earn my certification?
fields.answer: While self-paced eLearning and labs are not required, they are highly recommended to support your learning and exam readiness.

fields.question: What happens if I fail the exam?
fields.answer: Learners are allowed two attempts to pass the exam. If both attempts are unsuccessful, new training will need to be purchased for additional exam attempts.

fields.question: How do I share my badges on social media or the web?
fields.answer: BeyondTrust University issues verified digital credentials through Credly. Simply log in to your Credly account and choose from the available sharing options. Sign in to your preferred social platform, grant permissions, add a message if desired, and share!

fields.question: How do I obtain CPE credits?
fields.answer: CPE credit information is provided within each course description and will be added to your activity records (available for download in the BTU portal) upon course completion.

fields.question: What is the validity period of the certification, and how do I renew once it expires?
fields.answer:
Certifications are valid for 2 years. You can check your status and renewal dates in your activity records within the BTU portal.

To renew your certification, you must purchase new training and successfully complete the certification exam again.

fields.question: What support is available if I have questions during training, the exam, or a retake?
fields.answer: For any questions, please contact btu@beyondtrust.com.

title: Success Elevated
headingSection: Elevate your learning with Success Elevated
bodyRedactorRestricted:
Success Elevated is our premium training subscription. It builds on the value of our on-demand eLearning by adding expert-led sessions and hands-on labs. This blended learning experience will strengthen your foundational knowledge and help you gain practical skills to apply best practices in real-world scenarios.

Stay current with regularly updated content aligned to the latest software releases—ensuring your training evolves alongside your solution, and you’re equipped with the most relevant insights, recommendations, and use cases to drive performance and value.

fields.heading: Live expert training
fields.body: Instructor-led courses and workshops designed to deepen administrative expertise.

fields.heading: Interactive labs
fields.body: Hands-on practice environments that strengthen real-world skills.

fields.heading: Certified skills
fields.body: Validate and showcase your professional achievements with recognized credentials.

fields.heading: Flexible seat transfers
fields.body: Easily accommodate evolving teams and onboarding needs.

fields.question: How do I know if Success Elevated is right for me?
fields.answer: Success Elevated is designed for teams that value flexibility in how they learn—offering live sessions, self-paced modules, and interactive hands-on labs all in one program. It’s also ideal for organizations that need fast, efficient onboarding and smooth transitions when team members change.

fields.question: How do I inquire more about Success Elevated?
fields.answer: If you are interested in purchasing our training, reach out to your account representative. If you do not know your representative,please fill out the form here and add Success Elevated into the message box. Someone will reach out to you after the submission.

fields.question: How soon can I begin training with Success Elevated after the purchase is finalized?
fields.answer: An email is sent one month before your start date with instructions on how to register for BeyondTrust University (BTU). Registration opens on your purchased start date, and once enrolled, you’ll have full access to BTU—including the ability to sign up for live training sessions right away.

fields.question: How do I log in to Success Elevated at BeyondTrust University?
fields.answer: If you are already a user, access the BeyondTrust University portal here.

fields.question: What other learning options are there?
fields.answer: See our main BeyondTrust University page to view other offerings: https://www.beyondtrust.com/se...

fields.headingSection: Check out course offerings for Success Elevated

fields.heading: Endpoint Privilege Management for Windows & Mac
fields.body: Blended learning designed to help admins master every aspect of Endpoint Privilege Management for Windows & Mac—from setup to expert-level usage for peak performance.

fields.heading: Password Safe Administration
fields.body: Blended learning designed to help admins master every aspect of Password Safe—from setup to expert-level usage for peak performance.

fields.heading: Privileged Remote Access Administration
fields.body: Blended learning designed to help admins master every aspect of Privileged Remote Access—from setup to expert-level usage for peak performance.

fields.heading: Remote Support Administration
fields.body: Blended learning designed to help admins master every aspect of Remote Support—from setup to expert-level usage for peak performance.

title: Password Safe Administration - Success Elevated
body200: Blended learning designed to help admins master every aspect of Password Safe—from setup to expert-level usage for peak performance.
bodyRedactorRestricted: The Password Safe subscription course is ideal for security professionals who need to learn how to deploy, configure, and utilize Password Safe in their unique environment. During the course, you will learn best practices for deploying and administering Password Safe.

fields.bodyRedactorRestricted:
• Initial Configuration – Learn how to configure Password Safe for your environment.
  • Onboarding Systems – Discover new assets in your network and enable their management through Password Safe.
  • Session Usage – Learn to use the Password Safe console to request and approve sessions, enable session recording, and view sessions & reports.
  • Creating Workflow with Smart Rules – Manage your workflow by adding directories, users, and machines through Smart Rules.
  • Additional Configuration – Configure databases, Remote Apps, and SSH Keys.
  • Deployment – Install and configure the U-Series appliance, software installation, and Password Safe Cloud components.

What’s New

Discover the newest features and updates to Password Safe and the newest additions to the Subscription training.

First Steps

Gain foundational knowledge necessary to get started with Password Safe. You will learn the problems password management addresses, key features of Password Safe, common use cases, and the basics of the BeyondInsight management console.

Core Knowledge

Learn how to configure and administer Password Safe by familiarizing with concepts such as Password Policies, Smart Rules, Directory Queries, etc...

Additional Features

Learn about BeyondInsight Analytics and Reporting; expand your knowledge with instructor-led workshops; and finally, enhance your understanding of Password Safe administrative features.

fields.body250: This training includes continuously updated on-demand eLearning and instructor-led as well as a hands-on lab environment. Make the most of the recommendations and insights into product features and best practice use-cases based on your schedule.

fields.heading: Instructor-Led Shared Virtual Training
fields.body: Every Success Elevated license includes access to our comprehensive, virtual instructor-led administrative training sessions. Click here to explore what’s covered and how it can elevate your expertise.

fields.heading: Live Workshops
fields.body: During our live workshop sessions, our world-class instructor team will demonstrate specific aspects of a course and allow learners to ask questions along the way. These workshops provide the perfect opportunity to get answers to your questions about how particular pieces of the product work and are especially helpful for administrators managing more challenging environments and use cases. The sessions are offered at several times to accommodate different time zones around the globe.

fields.heading: Hands-On Lab Environment
fields.body: Our virtual lab environment allows you to interact with Password Safe and see how it operates in a live setting. The accompanying lab guide gives step-by-step exercises that teach how to execute common setup and configuration tasks. You will use web-based virtual machines and your login to access the environment following the detailed walkthroughs provided along with our training.

fields.heading: On-Demand eLearning
fields.body: Build knowledge of best practices, product features, and implementation workflows all based around the schedule that matters most: yours! Constant access means that you can return to concepts over time to review or refresh whenever you want. Because the content is continuously updated, you can trust that you are up to date on new features and workflows that empower you to securely do your job.

fields.headingSection: Get Certified while earning CPE credits
fields.bodyRedactorRestricted: Earn CPE credits and get everything you need to pass your certification with confidence—from hands-on labs to expert-led workshops. Learn more about our certification program and see all of BeyondTrust University's digital badges with Credly here.

metaGlobalVars.seoDescription: Gain the foundational knowledge needed to administer, configure, and utilize your BeyondTrust solution for optimum performance.

title: Privileged Remote Access Administration - Success Elevated

fields.headingSection: Privileged Remote Access Administration - Success Elevated

body200: Blended learning designed to help admins master every aspect of Privileged Remote Access—from setup to expert-level usage for peak performance.
bodyRedactorRestricted: The Privileged Remote Access subscription course is ideal for security professionals who need to learn how to deploy, configure, and utilize Privileged Remote Access in their unique environment. During the course, you will learn best practices for deploying and administering Privileged Remote Access.

fields.bodyRedactorRestricted:
• Configuring the Appliance – Learn how to configure Privileged Remote Access in your network, including: software installation, defining email alerts, and saving site backups.
  • Provisioning Secure Endpoint Access – Define best practice security options regarding endpoint access and site-wide settings.
  • Establishing Security Policies – Focus on session policy creation, defining local users and support teams, defining group policies, and configuration of LDAP security providers.
  • Optimizing Session Reporting and Archival – Learn how to access detailed session reports and how to use the session forensics feature, as well as session archival with the BeyondTrust Integration Client.
  • Manage Credentials – Details how to configure and use vault to allow storage and injection of privileged credentials.

What’s New

Discover the newest features and updates to Privileged Remote Access and the newest additions to the Subscription training.

First Steps

Gain foundational knowledge necessary to get started with Privileged Remote Access. You will be introduced to the core concepts of the product and be taken through the steps necessary to set up and configure your appliance.

Core Knowledge

Learn about the powerful deployment possibilities available in your Privileged Remote Access environment, including different methods of accessing endpoints, tools available to Access Console users, and how to properly organize your users’ access rights.

Additional Features

Learn to configure and use BeyondTrust Vault to allow storage and injection of privileged credentials as well as the many ways Privileged Remote Access can help you examine historical session information and identify trends using reports.

title: Remote Support Administration – Success Elevated
body200: Blended learning designed to help admins master every aspect of Remote Support—from setup to expert-level usage for peak performance.
bodyRedactorRestricted: The Remote Support subscription course is ideal for security professionals who need to learn how to deploy, configure, and utilize Remote Support in their unique environment. During the course, you will learn best practices for installing and administering Remote Support.

fields.bodyRedactorRestricted:
• Configure the Appliance – Learn how to configure Remote Support in the network, including: software installation, defining email alerts, and saving site backups.
  • Establishing Security Policies – Set site-wide security options, define local users, create group policies, and add users and support teams through existing directory services, such as Active Directory.
  • Enabling Support Options – Learn about representative and customer-initiated support options. Configure Support Buttons, Canned Scripts, Special Actions, collaboration, Jump technology, and public portals for deployment.

What’s New

Discover the newest features and updates to Remote Support and the newest additions to the subscription training.

First Steps

Gain foundational knowledge necessary to get started with Remote Support. You will be introduced to the core concepts of the Remote Support product and be taken through the steps necessary to set up and configure your appliance.

Core Knowledge

Learn about the powerful deployment possibilities available in your environment, including different methods of accessing endpoints, tools available to Access Console users, and how to properly organize your users’ access rights.

Additional Features

Learn to configure and use BeyondTrust Vault to allow storage and injection of privileged credentials as well as the many ways Remote Support can help you examine historical session information and identify trends using reports.

title: Remote Support Console
body200: User-level course is ideal for help desk analysts, support professionals, and managers who want a solid understanding of the Representative Console.
bodyRedactorRestricted:
Gain the foundational knowledge needed to administer, configure, and utilize your BeyondTrust solution for optimum performance. BeyondTrust University training is designed to maximize the value of your BeyondTrust solutions by educating your users on best practices for configuring and using our products.

Ideal for help desk analysts, support professionals and managers, this course provides a solid understanding of the Representative Console, and what your customer sees during a support session. During the half-day course, your support representatives will become knowledgeable in session initiation, troubleshooting tools, session management and other support features. As a result, reps gain confidence and greater efficiency when initiating sessions and resolving customer issues.

fields.bodyRedactorRestricted:
This course is available in the following formats:

  • Private Virtual - 4 hours
  • Private On-site - 4 hours
  • eLearning - Self-paced, 4 hours

All courses come with manuals, virtual lab environments, and access to BeyondTrust University’s education portal. Private sessions have up to 10 seats available.

• Setup and Installation – Console setup and installation, a brief overview, and how to log in
  • Session Initiation – Using Click-to-Chat, attended and unattended session initiation options, public portal overview, and session initiation from the customer’s perspective
  • Representative Console Basics – Managing queues and sessions, screen sharing, session elevation, and chat tool utilization
  • Session Management Tools – Screen sharing tools, file transfer, using command shell and canned scripts, accessing system information, and representative collaboration
  • Mastering the Representative Console – Using Jump technology to access attended and unattended systems, supporting mobile devices and platforms, and accessing reports
Participants who successfully complete the Remote Support Console for Users training are eligible to take the associated BeyondTrust exam to verify knowledge and understanding.

title: AD Bridge Foundations
body200: Administration-level course covers installation, administration, and monitoring with AD Bridge.
bodyRedactorRestricted:
Gain the foundational knowledge needed to administer, configure, and utilize your BeyondTrust solution for optimum performance. BeyondTrust University training is designed to maximize the value of your BeyondTrust solutions by educating your users on best practices for configuring and using our products.

The AD Bridge Foundations course is designed for the IT security management professional tasked with administering, monitoring and reporting on AD Bridge. Participants learn how to install and configure all product components, including the Management Console, Reporting Database and operating system Agents. They will connect a Unix host to Active Directory, create and configure Group Policy Objects, configure Active Directory users for Unix/Linux logon via console, SSH & PuTTY.

fields.bodyRedactorRestricted:
This course is available in the following formats:

  • Private Virtual - 12 hours over 3 days
  • Private On-site - 3 days (up to 10 seats)

All courses come with manuals and access to BeyondTrust University’s education portal. Private sessions have up to 10 seats available.

• Architecture Overview – Understand the architecture, traffic flow, and general functionality of AD Bridge.
  • Initial Configuration – Learn about the logging and management tools of AD Bridge and how to configure them properly.
  • Extend Group Policy Objects (GPO) – Understand how to create GPO(s) that manage users and their attributes automatically.
  • Manage Identity Agents – Learn about agent services and how to manage and troubleshoot issues.

fields.headingSection: Get Certified while earning CPE credits
fields.bodyRedactorRestricted: Participants who successfully complete the AD Bridge Foundations training are eligible to take the associated BeyondTrust Certification exam and earn up to 12 hours of Continuing Professional Education (CPE) credits. Learn more about our certification program and see all of BeyondTrust University's digital badges with Credly here.

title: Endpoint Privilege Management for Unix & Linux

fields.headingSection: Endpoint Privilege Management for Unix & Linux

body200: Administator-level course covers installation, administering, monitoring and reporting for Endpoint Privilege Management for Unix & Linux.
bodyRedactorRestricted:
Gain the foundational knowledge needed to administer, configure, and utilize your BeyondTrust solution for optimum performance. BeyondTrust University training is designed to maximize the value of your BeyondTrust solutions by educating your users on best practices for configuring and using our products.

This course is designed for the IT security professional tasked with installation, administering, monitoring and reporting on Endpoint Privilege Management for Unix & Linux. Students learn how to install the products components, identify and edit configuration files, create policy for privilege delegation, install the components needed for I/O log review, and use the Analytics and Reporting from within BeyondInsight.

fields.bodyRedactorRestricted:
• Initial Configuration – Learn how to install and configure BeyondInsight for Unix & Linux and the Endpoint Privilege Management for Unix & Linux software suite for your environment.
  • Deploy Policies – See how to configure script-based or role-based policies and deploy them using the policy editor.
  • Reports and Auditing – Review your event logs and investigate activity, including the Advanced Control and Audit (ACA) feature.

This course is available in these formats:

  • Private Virtual - 15 hours over 3 days
  • Private On-site - 3 days (up to 10 seats)

All courses come with manuals, virtual lab environments, and access to BeyondTrust University’s education portal. Private sessions have up to 10 seats available.

fields.headingSection: Get certified while earning CPE credits
fields.bodyRedactorRestricted: Participants who successfully complete the Endpoint Privilege Management for Unix & Linux training are eligible to take the associated BeyondTrust Certification exam and earn up to 15 hours of Continuing Professional Education (CPE) credits. Learn more about our certification program and see all of BeyondTrust University's digital badges with Credly here.

title: Endpoint Privilege Management for Mac
body200: Administrator-level course covers how to deploy, configure, and utilize Endpoint Privilege Management for Mac in their unique environment.
bodyRedactorRestricted:
Gain the foundational knowledge needed to administer, configure, and utilize your BeyondTrust solution for optimum performance. BeyondTrust University training is designed to maximize the value of your BeyondTrust solutions by educating your users on best practices for configuring and using our products.

This course is designed for security professionals who need to learn how to deploy, configure, and utilize Endpoint Privilege Management for Mac in their unique environment. During the course, administrators will learn best practices for installing and administering Endpoint Privileged Management for Mac.

fields.bodyRedactorRestricted:
This course is available in the following formats:

  • Shared or Private Virtual - 8 hours over 2 days
  • Private On-site - 1-2 days (up to 10 seats)

All courses come with manuals and access to BeyondTrust University’s education portal. Private sessions have up to 10 seats available.

• Deploying the Software – Walk through the different ways of installing and deploying the software including deployment to endpoints.
  • Configuration and Control – Learn how to configure policies and how to create application control through workstyles and application groups.
  • Achieve Least Privilege – Remove excessive end-user privileges without hindering productivity.
  • Control Authorization Requests – Maintain security, user productivity, and IT operational efficiency by enforcing least privilege across the Mac environment.

fields.headingSection: Get certified while earning CPE credits
fields.bodyRedactorRestricted: Participants who successfully complete the Endpoint Privilege Management for Mac training are eligible to take the associated BeyondTrust Certification exam and earn up to 8 hours of Continuing Professional Education (CPE) credits. Learn more about our certification program and see all of BeyondTrust University's digital badges with Credly here.

title: Endpoint Privilege Management for Windows
body200: Administration-level course covers how to deploy, configure, and utilize Endpoint Privilege Management for Windows.
bodyRedactorRestricted:
Gain the foundational knowledge needed to administer, configure, and utilize your BeyondTrust solution for optimum performance. BeyondTrust University training is designed to maximize the value of your BeyondTrust solutions by educating your users on best practices for configuring and using our products.

This course is designed for security professionals who need to learn how to deploy, configure, and utilize Endpoint Privilege Management for Windows in their unique environment. During the course, administrators will learn best practices for installing and administering Endpoint Privilege Management for Windows. This course includes a hands-on lab with exercises for students to practice what they learn.

fields.bodyRedactorRestricted:
This course is available in the following formats:

  • Shared or Private Virtual - 16 hours over 4 days
  • Private On-site - 3 days (up to 10 seats)

All courses come with manuals, virtual lab environments, and access to BeyondTrust University’s education portal. Private sessions have up to 10 seats available.

• Configuration and Control – Learn how to configure policies and applying application control through workstyles and application groups.
  • Achieve Least Privilege – Remove excessive end user privileges on Windows without hindering productivity.
  • Elevate Applications, not Users – Maintain security, user productivity, and IT operational efficiency by enforcing least privilege across the desktop environment.
  • Troubleshooting – Apply a logical troubleshooting process to resolve and understand the root cause of issues.

title: Endpoint Privilege Management for Windows & Mac – Success Elevated

fields.headingSection: Endpoint Privilege Management for Windows & Mac – Success Elevated

body200: Blended learning designed to help admins master every aspect of Endpoint Privilege Management for Windows & Mac—from setup to expert-level usage for peak performance.
bodyRedactorRestricted: This Endpoint Privilege Management for Windows & Mac subscription course is ideal for security professionals who need to learn about security risks, the role and benefits of least privilege, the user experience with Endpoint Privilege Management, and the components of its framework.

fields.bodyRedactorRestricted:
• Configuration and Control – Learn how to configure policies and how to create application control through workstyles and application groups.
  • Achieve Least Privilege – Remove excessive end-user privileges on Window, Mac, and network devices without hindering productivity.
  • Control Authorization Requests – Maintain security, user productivity, and IT operational efficiency by enforcing least privilege across the Window & Mac environment.
  • Endpoint Privilege Management for Cloud (EPM-C) - Learn the components and steps necessary to deploy and properly configure the endpoint Client to successfully communicate with EPM-C.

fields.headingSection: Endpoint Privilege Management for Windows & Mac topics
fields.bodyRedactorRestricted:
What’s New

Discover the newest features and updates to EPM Windows and Mac Subscription training.

Introduction & Core Knowledge

Gain the foundational knowledge necessary to get started with Endpoint Privilege Management for Windows & Mac. You will be introduced to EPM’S core concepts, installation, policy components, and policy designs.

Use Cases

Discover use cases on standard behaviors of authorize, passive and block. Practice how to apply the components in our lab environment and scenario simulations.

Advanced Topics & Additional Resources

Discover advanced features as well as topics like troubleshooting, Cloud overview, and reporting that might apply to special use cases in your organization. Also, expand your knowledge with the variety of live workshops led by our BTU Instructors.

fields.body250: This training includes continuously updated on-demand eLearning and instructor-led, as well as a hands-on lab environment. Make the most of the recommendations and insights into product features and best practice use-cases, based on your schedule.

fields.heading: Instructor-Led Shared Virtual Training
fields.body: Every Success Elevated license includes access to our comprehensive, virtual instructor-led administrative training sessions. Click here for EPM-Windows & click here for EPM-Mac to explore what’s covered and how it can elevate your expertise.

fields.heading: Live Workshops
fields.body: During our live workshop sessions, our world-class instructor team will demonstrate specific aspects of the product and allow learners to ask questions. These workshops provide the perfect opportunity to get answers to your questions about how particular pieces of the product work, and are especially helpful for administrators managing more challenging environments and use cases. The sessions are offered at several times to accommodate different time zones around the globe.

fields.heading: Hands-On Lab Environment
fields.body: Our virtual lab environments allow learners to configure and test an Endpoint Privilege Management for Windows environment, gaining firsthand knowledge of how the software operates in a live setting. An accompanying lab guide gives step-by-step exercises on how to execute common and advanced configuration, as well as reference the self-paced eLearning modules to understand overlaying best practices and use cases.

fields.heading: macOS Scenarios for Practice
fields.body: Our virtual simulations will give you hands-on practice with Endpoint Privilege Management for Mac. These are designed to enhance your understanding of the administrative aspects of EPM-M and will increase your confidence using the product.

fields.heading: On-Demand eLearning
fields.body: Build knowledge of best practices, product features, and implementation workflows, all based around the schedule that matters most: yours! Constant access means you can return to concepts over time to review or refresh whenever you want. Because the content is continuously updated, you can trust that you are up to date on new features and workflows that empower you to securely do your job.

fields.headingSection: Get certified while earning CPE credits
fields.bodyRedactorRestricted: Earn CPE credits and get everything you need to pass your certification with confidence—from hands-on labs to expert-led workshops. Learn more about our certification program and see all of BeyondTrust University's digital badges with Credly here.

metaGlobalVars.seoDescription: New BeyondTrust EPM training courses are regularly added as new software versions are released, so you can know what to anticipate during an update.

title: Password Safe for Users
body200: User-level course is ideal for training privileged users on the Web Portal and their day-to-day use of Password Safe.
bodyRedactorRestricted:
Gain the foundational knowledge needed to administer, configure, and utilize your BeyondTrust solution for optimum performance. BeyondTrust University training is designed to maximize the value of your BeyondTrust solutions by educating your users on best practices for configuring and using our products.

The Password Safe for Users course is ideal for training privileged users on the Web Portal and their day-to-day use of Password Safe. During the course your privileged users will become knowledgeable in password rotation, session management, and navigating our BeyondInsight Web Portal.

fields.bodyRedactorRestricted: Password Safe for Users is available for on-demand consumption, so your users can engage in eLearning at their own pace, available 24x7. This format is ideal for new hires and individuals needing to come up to speed quickly.

• Navigating the Web Portal – Familiarize learners with using local accounts and showing AD login.
  • Password Access – Request and retrieve passwords using Password Safe.
  • Account Grid – Prioritize and navigate the information important to your organization.
  • Session Usage – Learn to use the Password Safe console to request SSH & RDP Sessions.
Participants who successfully complete the Password Safe User training are eligible to take the associated BeyondTrust exam to verify knowledge and understanding.

title: Privileged Remote Access Console
body200: User-level course is ideal for any resource who plans to connect to endpoints using the Privileged Remote Access Console.
bodyRedactorRestricted:
Gain the foundational knowledge needed to administer, configure, and utilize your BeyondTrust solution for optimum performance. BeyondTrust University training is designed to maximize the value of your BeyondTrust solutions by educating your users on best practices for configuring and using our products.

The Privileged Remote Access Console course is ideal for any resource who plans to connect to endpoints using the Access Console. During this course your Access Console users will learn how to install the console and access remote endpoints using the consoles.

fields.bodyRedactorRestricted:
This course is available in the following formats:

  • Private Virtual - 3 hours
  • Private On-site - 3 hours
  • eLearning - Self-paced, 3 hours

All courses come with manuals, virtual lab environments, and access to BeyondTrust University’s education portal. Private sessions have up to 10 seats available.

• Setup and Installation – See how to install and log into the Privileged Remote Access Console, and learn about the basic features.
  • Session Initiation – Learn how to access endpoints securely using BeyondTrust’s patented Jump technology.
  • Session Management & Tools – Understand how to screen share and use the numerous tools within screen sharing, how to use the file transfer, command shell, system info, and registry tools.
  • Reporting Features – Learn how to access detailed session reports and how to use the session forensics feature.
Participants who successfully complete the Privileged Remote Access Console training are eligible to take the associated BeyondTrust exam to verify knowledge and understanding.

title: Privileged Remote Access Administration
body200: Administrator-level course for system and network admins who want to learn how to configure BeyondTrust in the network and manage secure access to critical systems.
bodyRedactorRestricted:
Gain the foundational knowledge needed to administer, configure, and utilize your BeyondTrust solution for optimum performance. BeyondTrust University training is designed to maximize the value of your BeyondTrust solutions by educating your users on best practices for configuring and using our products.

The Privileged Remote Access Administration course is ideal for system and network administrators who want to learn how to configure BeyondTrust in the network and manage secure access to critical systems utilizing BeyondTrust’s patented Jump Technology and other access features. During this course your administrators will learn how to efficiently administer and configure BeyondTrust on an ongoing basis for optimized security.

fields.bodyRedactorRestricted:
This course is available in these formats:

  • Shared or Private Virtual - 16 hours over 4 days
  • Private On-site - 3 days (up to 10 seats)

All courses come with manuals, virtual lab environments, and access to BeyondTrust University’s education portal. Private sessions have up to 10 seats available.

• Provisioning Secure Endpoint Access – Define best practice security options regarding endpoint access and site-wide settings.
  • Establishing Security Policies – Focus on session policy creation, defining local users and support teams, defining group policies, and configuration of LDAP security providers.
  • Optimizing Session Reporting and Archival – Learn how to access detailed session reports and how to use the session forensics feature, as well as session archival with the BeyondTrust Integration Client

fields.headingSection: Get Certified while earning CPE credits
fields.bodyRedactorRestricted: Participants who successfully complete the Privileged Remote Access Administration training are eligible to take the associated BeyondTrust Certification exam and earn up to 16 hours of Continuing Professional Education (CPE) credits. Learn more about our certification program and see all of BeyondTrust University's digital badges with Credly here.

The Remote Support Administration course is ideal for administrators and support managers who want to learn how to configure and extend Remote Support for your unique environment. During the course, they will learn how to efficiently administer and configure Remote Support on an ongoing basis.

fields.bodyRedactorRestricted:

title: Success Included
body200: On-demand training program, available at no additional cost to all active customers.
bodyRedactorRestricted: Success Included is our on-demand training program, available at no additional cost to all active customers. This industry-leading approach ensures that every customer has immediate access to comprehensive training across our entire product portfolio—regardless of which products they own. Available 24x7 across global time zones, the learning includes product onboarding, key features, maintenance, and much more!

fields.question: What is included with the program?
fields.answer: The program includes full access to our self-paced learning library at BeyondTrust University, covering everything from product overviews to successfully deploying the solution.

fields.question: What products are currently covered in Success Included?
fields.answer:
We’re actively working toward full coverage of all BeyondTrust solutions. Currently, the following products are included:

  • AD Bridge
  • Remote Support
  • Privileged Remote Access
  • Password Safe
  • Endpoint Privilege Management (Windows, Mac, & Linux)
  • Entitle
  • Identity Security Insights

fields.question: Do learners need technical knowledge to understand the content? Are there any prerequisites?
fields.answer: Currently, our courses are designed primarily for product administrators and are best suited for individuals with an intermediate understanding of technical concepts and the cybersecurity landscape.

fields.question: How do I access Success Included at BeyondTrust University?
fields.answer:
"Success Included" refers to all available eLearning courses in your BeyondTrust University library. Simply log in to BeyondTrust University and enroll in any available course.

You need an Okta ID to log in to BeyondTrust University. If you do not have an Okta ID, contact your company's administrator.

fields.question: How is Success Included different from other training offerings?
fields.answer:
Success Included provides self-paced eLearning courses across all BeyondTrust solutions and is included with your product subscription or active maintenance. For those who want to go further, our premium learning subscription, Success Elevated, and our immersive Private Instructor-Led Training options are also available.

Our learning subscription includes access to expert-led administrative courses, topic-focused workshops, hands-on labs, and certification exams designed to support advanced skill development. Private Instructor-Led Training offers structured, in-depth sessions delivered directly by our expert instructors.

Explore the learning options below to find the path that best supports your goals.

fields.body250: Accelerate your technical and professional learning experience with our advanced learning offerings.

fields.heading: Success Elevated
fields.body: Enhance your learning with flexible self-paced training, expert-led sessions, and hands-on labs to elevate skills, confidence, and results.

fields.heading: Shared Virtual
fields.body: Virtual, instructor-led training offered at set times that provide opportunities for interaction and discussion; registration required and will include attendees from a variety of companies.

fields.heading: Private Training
fields.body: Instructor-led training that is offered live either on-site at your location or as a virtual course; will only include your company's participants.

metaGlobalVars.seoDescription: A modular, on-demand training course for admins who need to learn how to deploy, configure, and utilize Remote Support in their environment.

title: Password Safe Administration
body200: Administration-level course covers administering, monitoring, configuring, and reporting on your Password Safe environment.
bodyRedactorRestricted:
Gain the foundational knowledge needed to administer, configure, and utilize your BeyondTrust solution for optimum performance. BeyondTrust University training is designed to maximize the value of your BeyondTrust solutions by educating your users on best practices for configuring and using our products.

The Password Safe Administration course is ideal for security professionals tasked with administering, monitoring, reporting and configuring your unique BeyondTrust environment. During the course, you will learn how to efficiently administer and configure Password Safe on an ongoing basis.

fields.bodyRedactorRestricted:
This course is available in the following formats:

  • Shared or Private Virtual - 16 hours over 4 days
  • Private On-site - 3 days (up to 10 seats)

All courses come with manuals, virtual lab environments, and access to BeyondTrust University’s education portal. Private sessions have up to 10 seats available.

• Initial Configuration – Learn how to configure Password Safe for your environment.
  • Onboarding Systems – Discover new assets in your network and enable their management through Password Safe.
  • Session Usage – Learn to use the Password Safe console to: request & approve sessions, enable session recording, and view sessions & reports.
  • Creating Workflow with Smart Rules – Manage your workflow by adding directories, users, and machines through Smart Rules.
  • Additional Configuration – Configure databases Remote Apps, and SSH Keys.

Participants who successfully complete the Password Safe training are eligible to take the associated BeyondTrust Certification exam and earn up to 16 hours of Continuing Professional Education (CPE) credits. Learn more about our certification program and see all of BeyondTrust University's digital badges with Credly here.
